segment-text: Lee Eisenberg & Gene Stupnitsky
April 4, 2017
HIGH ABOVE THE SAN FERNANDO VALLEY. Suburban sprawl. Blue pools and green yards as far as the eye can see. We slowly
DESCEND to -EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - SAME
Two teens -- HANNAH, 16, popular with strong, uninformed opinions and LILY, 16, intense and captain of the varsity field hockey team, sunbathe poolside. They pass a vape pen between them.
I'm so over music festivals.
They're so fucking corporatized.
Totally, except for Coachella, which is more than a festival.
Yeah, it's more a way of life.
We HEAR a buzzing. They look up. REVERSE ANGLE A DRONE -- the PHANTOM 3 STANDARD QUADCOPTER -- hovers high above them.
What the fuck?
From inside, JASLYN, 16, approaches the sliding glass door. She has the beauty of Kendall Jenner and the intelligence of Kendall Jenner. She walks into the glass door.
Owww! Not again.
Jaslyn, holding her head, opens the slider and joins them.
Do you hear that buzzing?
(re her head) You can hear that, too?
One of them mans the drone on an iPad, which feeds into a FLAT SCREEN TV.
EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - SAME
The girls quickly cover themselves.
I bet it's that old guy who tried taking pictures of your feet.
I know who it is.
INT. SUBURBAN HOUSE - LIVING ROOM - SAME
ON THE DRONE FEED, the girls give them the finger.

Why do they hate us? They don't even know us. This is MAX, 12, flanked by the two other boys. He isn't the coolest or the smartest kid, but he's cool and smart enough. Loves dinosaurs and skateboards. Recently discovered masturbation.
Two small hands snatch the iPad from Max.
Holy fucking shit! Drop the towels! Drop the towels!
This is QUENTIN, 12. He's short and stout and isn't happy about it. Considers himself hyper-intelligent, but really just parrots sentence fragments he hears adults say. Recently
Another boy grabs a couch cushion and humps it wildly.
Ayyyyyyyyeeeeeeeee!! This is FABRIZIO, 12. Hyper and horny foreign exchange student.
The language barrier is very real. Dresses like he's about to have lunch in Capri. Been masturbating for ten months.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
I'm going lower. Get ready for some major titillation. BOY'S VOICE (O.S.) What the fuck?!

TURN TO REVEAL XAVIER-RAYMOND, 12, bounding down the stairs. Everyone calls him X-Ray. Cool nickname, but he's neurotic, suffers from IBS and is prone to crying fits. He's just come from upstairs, where he was masturbating.
Your neighbor's in a bikini! And
she has friends over! Girls!
I don't care! I fucking told you, I'm not allowed to use my dad's stuff unless supervised. You guys never listen to me!
Just five more minutes. No!
X-RAY
X-Ray lunges at Quentin, who yanks the control away.
EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - SAME
The Girls stare up as the Drone LURCHES from side to side, DROPS thirty feet, SPINS out of control.
INT. X-RAY'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM - SAME
Quentin and X-Ray jostle for control of the iPad. Fabrizio now dry-humps the pillow from behind.
You're gonna break it! Give it! Fine!
Quentin lets go, sending X-Ray falling back. The iPad SLIDES under the couch. They all GASP. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - SAME
The Drone suddenly NOSEDIVES, going straight for the Girls, who scream and DUCK for cover.
INT. X-RAY'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM - SAME
ON THE DRONE FEED The boys watch in horror as the DRONE plummets. Max scrambles to the couch and stretches out his arm. The iPad is just out of reach. Lift it!
The others can barely lift the couch, but it's just enough for Max to reach the iPad. Got it!
MAX (CONT'D) EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - SAME
The drone STABILIZES mere feet from the ground.
INT. X-RAY'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM - SAME
The boys breathe a sigh of relief. ON THE DRONE FEED Almost like a zombie movie, the three GIRLS move toward the drone, arms outstretched.
Go up! Go up! Go up!

Max jerks the iPad up. The Drone rises, barely escaping Lily's outstretched hand. The guys CHEER, until -EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - SAME Hannah LAUNCHES herself off a chaise lounge, GRABBING the landing skids of the drone and taking it down.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE INT. X-RAY'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM - SAME

The camera shakes, catching images of grass, sky and then -HANNAH'S FACE comes into focus. The boys stare in horror. HANNAH Listen, you little -A hand covers the drone's camera. The screen goes BLACK. After a beat, all three girls appear in frame, smiling and flirty.
Hey guys, we want to hang out. We're soooo lonely over here.
I need someone to rub lotion on me. ON THE BOYS
Slack-jawed. Quentin turns to the others. Let's go.
Fabrizio pulls a travel-sized Axe Body Spray from his pocket and douses himself.
Wait! What if it's a trap?
Not everything is a trap, Max. Just deal with the fact that they want to party. We'll go over there, lick some tits, and get the drone back.
They're four grades older than us!
They horny cougars.
We're not going to a stranger's house. We'll wait for your mom to come home. She can walk us over.
Fine. Whatever.
They have my dad's drone. I'll go myself.
Wait, you can't go over there alone. They've been smoking drugs all day.
We're coming with you. They could be erratic.
They all head for the door. Quentin stops, considering:
I hope they don't have STDs.
I/E. HANNAH'S HOUSE - DAY
Hannah opens the front door to REVEAL our four boys. They've all combed their hair and tucked in their shirts. Hannah towers over the boys.
Ciao, bella.
Come in, guys. We've been waiting for you.
X-Ray clocks the drone on the kitchen island.
Thank you. This is a lovely home.
The boys study the girls with a mix of fear and desire. X-RAY
As soon as they've stepped into the foyer, Lily appears behind them and SLAMS the door shut, LOCKING them in.
It's a trap!
Lily and Jaslyn block the door.
You think it's cool to objectify women?
The boys clearly have no idea what "objectify" means. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
(unsure) We weren't. We were just looking at your bodies.
We need a guarantee that you'll never objectify anyone again. Like what?
INT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - LATER
Hannah, Lily and Jaslyn stifle laughs.
Get out here!
The Boys enter, completely transformed: dresses, makeup, painted fingernails, mascara, barrettes, the works.
Ooh, I want the little one. I want to put her in my pocket.
I'm not little. My doctor says I'm going to be 5'9", honey.
Relax, Munchkin.
Hannah holds up her phone and snaps PHOTOS.
What are you gonna do with those?
Maybe I'll send them to my sister. She's in eighth grade at John Adams. Isn't that where you go?
Hannah tosses the phone into her bright yellow BEACH BAG.
You're gonna have to transfer schools.
X-Ray begins hyperventilating. Mascara RUNS down his face. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Give us... the ... drone!
Lily takes the Drone and puts it on the floor. She lifts her foot over it, taunting him. Hannah and Jaslyn laugh. X-Ray runs over and covers the Drone, protecting it.
Fuck you, STD bitches!
They look over to see Quentin holding Hannah's beach bag.
I have her phone! Run!
Quentin races out the back, Hannah hot on his heels. X-Ray BITES Lily in the calf. Owww!
LILY
X-Ray scoops up the Drone and races for the yard. Max and Fabrizio follow. Jaslyn jumps in front of them. Fabrizio KICKS her in the crotch. She goes down.
That's what you get!
BAM! From the ground, Jaslyn UPPERCUTS Max in his balls. He crumples. X-Ray and Fabrizio scoop him up and keep running.
EXT. HANNAH'S HOUSE - BACKYARD - CONTINUOUS

Quentin races alongside the pool. Hannah's gaining. He runs past a patio chair and knocks it down, TRIPPING Hannah. The other boys hurdle over her and join Quentin. They reach an EIGHT FOOT FENCE blocking them in. To them, it might as well be twenty feet.
Ten fingers!

Max lifts Quentin up and over, followed by Fabrizio, who then pulls Max up. Max straddles the top of the fence and lowers his arm down to X-Ray, who cradles the drone. Max strains to pull him up. XRay looks back. The girls are gaining. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Pull! Pull!
He's almost over when suddenly, he's jerked back. Lily pulls at the drone's plastic frame.
X-RAY (CONT'D)
X-Ray loses his grip on the drone.
X-RAY (CONT'D)
It's slipping! Lily pulls the drone away from X-Ray. It falls to the ground. She grabs his leg. X-Ray struggles to wrestle free and accidentally KICKS her in the head.
Ow! You kicked me in the head!
On accident!
Lily SMASHES the drone.
X-RAY (CONT'D)
Max pulls X-Ray over the fence. ON THE STREET X-RAY (CONT'D)
(calling over the fence) Fucking cougars!!
A COUPLES passes pushing a stroller.
Language, girls! Sorry.
BOYS
The boys RACE down the street, sundresses flapping in the wind.

8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE The boys run THROUGH THE TITLE and turn into X-Ray's driveway, just as a BMW pulls in. A handsome, middle-aged man steps out. He carries himself like a former athlete. This is X-RAY'S DAD. He looks the boys up and down, taking in the dresses. He looks disgusted. X-RAY'S DAD
No one speaks. X-Ray's Dad shakes his head.
X-RAY'S DAD (CONT'D)
tomorrow.
The boys watch as X-Ray's Dad leads him to the front door -dead man walking.
INT. LILY'S MINI COOPER - THE NEXT DAY
Lily drives. Hannah sits shotgun, phone to her ear. Jaslyn leans in from the back.
Those little shits aren't picking up.
Should we call Jordy?
Whoever Jordy is, none of them jump at this idea.
Why were we even holding Jordy's drugs?
(as to a child) When you have two strikes, you can't hold your own drugs, Jaslyn. And we each get a free pill.
What if those kids open the bottle and overdose on Molly? We put them in a fucking Flintstones Vitamins bottle!
(optimistic) Or what if they open the bottle, take Molly, and have the best day of their lives?! Off the Girls, considering.
INT. BUS - DAY CLOSE ON
Quentin, struggling mightily to open a FLINTSTONES VITAMIN PILL CONTAINER.
Whatever. Chewables suck. Gummies are so much better.

PULL BACK TO REVEAL Max, Quentin, and Fabrizio, all dressed in SCHOOL UNIFORMS, sit at the front of the bus. They rummage through Hannah's bag. Fabrizio pulls out a tampon. Quentin snatches and inhales deeply. Another KID peers over and gags.
OH MY GOD! Gross! (then, calling back) Soren! They have a tampon!
SOREN, 12, who looks like the son of Cindy Crawford and Rande Gerber, calls from the back of the bus.
Hey, Quentin, stick it up your pussy hole!
Fuck you, you sexist bitch! I'll stick my dick up your nose!
Quentin stands on the seat and starts thrusting wildly in the air. Max slouches in his seat, embarrassed.
(quiet) Just sit down. This is why they're always making fun of us.
Who cares what he thinks? He has the same haircut as my sister.
The bus STOPS and a few kids, including X-Ray, step on. He looks terrible.
So what happened with your dad?
X-Ray hands Max a BROCHURE.
(reading) Camden Academy for Boys? (then) That's that boarding school in Nevada. Matt Chestnut went there.
It's where my dad went. He thinks I need it. He said I'm weak.
If he think that, he don't know you.
You can't go to boarding school. You couldn't even make it through tennis camp. (then) You need to stand up to him.
(defeated) I know, okay?
X-Ray looks down.
He's looking for an excuse. He said if I screw up again, I'm gone.
It's just a stupid drone.
He doesn't know that I broke it.
So when he finds out...
(quiet) ... I'm gone.
They take this in. Quentin pulls out his phone.
Ridiculous. I'm texting my nanny. She can go to the mall and get a new drone. She has my dad's credit card for emergencies. Problem solved.
X-Ray exhales, relieved. The theme song of "PRETTY LITTLE LIARS" starts playing from inside Max's backpack. He pulls out Hannah's phone. The caller ID reads: LILY.
They've called a thousand times.
Quentin takes the phone.
Get her passcode so we can delete the pictures.
Quentin answers.
You smell like a fart and taste like shit.
Quentin hangs up. Fabrizio, Quentin, and X-Ray laugh, pleased with themselves.
You didn't get the code.
Who cares? We have the phone, what are they going to do?
EXT. JOHN ADAMS MIDDLE SCHOOL - DAY
To establish. The bus pulls up to the curb. Waiting for them are HANNAH, LILY, and JASLYN.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE INT. SCHOOL BUS - SAME
The other students get off the bus. Our guys just stare out the window, terrified of the girls.
What do we do? We can't go out there.
(calling to Bus Driver) We need SCAB.
No way. We'll look like losers.
Do you wanna die??
EXT. JOHN ADAMS MIDDLE SCHOOL - MOMENTS LATER

SLO MO. Over Katy Perry's "ROAR" -Max, Quentin, X-Ray, and Fabrizio confidently step out of the bus and join a PONY-TAILED TEACHER and eight of the LEAST POPULAR STUDENTS in the school. They're all wearing blue smocks that read "STUDENT COALITION AGAINST BULLYING."
(chanting) Bullying is whack, get on the right track! Bullying is whack, get on the right track!

Max is mortified. This is so uncool. The SCAB MEMBERS, along with our boys, interlock arms to form a HUMAN CHAIN. They march up to Hannah, Lily, and Jaslyn. The SCAB LEADER, a boy with a wispy mustache and a heavy lisp, addresses the girls.
When you attack one of uth, you attack all of uth! Your weakneth giffs uth strength!
The Girls stare back, like "Is this happening?"
These kids stole my phone and my bag! And there's important stuff --
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
No, Bully! Not today! (then) Head out, headth up!

The Human Chain marches to the school. As they march, we see the back of their smocks reads, "I'M A SCAB FOR LIFE." Our boys turn back to see the girls giving them the "slit your throat" motion. Hannah's shirt lifts up slightly, revealing a hint of flesh. The boys notice.
Did you see her belly button?
As the boys enter the school, "ROAR" switches from Katy Perry to -- an ALL BOYS CHORUS.
INT. MUSIC ROOM - DAY

We pan over the bored faces of the STUDENTS until we land on the faces of our four boys -- eyes closed, passionate, deeply connected to the performance. A music teacher, MS. GRANDY, 70s, basically deaf, accompanies them on the piano.
(singing) "I got the eye of the tiger, a fighter --" On the word, "FIGHTER," the boys all pantomime PUNCHING. BOYS (CONT'D) (singing) "Dancing through the fire / Cause I am the champion..."
On the word, "CHAMPION," the boys raise their arms in triumph.
(singing) "And you're gonna hear me roar!"
On the word, "ROAR," the boys all pantomime ROARING by rearing their heads back. The song concludes.
That was great, guys!
The bell RINGS. All of the boys quickly head for the door. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Wait, wait, wait. Big night tonight. Everyone needs to be in costume by five-thirty. And make sure to go to the bathroom before we get on stage.
No accidents this year.
Quentin's phone BUZZES. He looks around and then walks into a closet with instruments. He closes the door behind him.
(into phone) Hola, Inez, que pasa?
INT. HALLWAY - SAME
Max, X-Ray, and Fabrizio exit. Soren calls out to Max.
Max! Come over here.
X-Ray and Fabrizio are surprised. Max hides his excitement.
Be right back.
Max jogs over. Soren leans against his locker with two equally cool kids. They all have the same haircut, where they constantly flick the bangs out of their eyes.
Hey, you were really fast in gym. Thanks.
So are you still coming to my party after the recital?
Yeah, I can't wait.
I invited some seventh grade girls, so... could turn into a kissing party.
I'll bring gum for the guys.
Soren look over, notices X-Ray and Fabrizio imitating their favorite DINOSAURS. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
They are so random.
Yeah, but they're kinda cool, too.
ANGLE ON Quentin. He exits the Music Room, joining X-Ray and Fabrizio.
Inez can't pick up the drone. Her husband needs the car.
What the fuck?!
Yeah, I don't know why they don't get a second car. She's loaded. She's always sending money to her family in Guatemala.
Quentin notices Max and Soren talking. They fist bump. Quentin looks very concerned.
What the shit?
Max returns to the others.
Why were you bantering with that individual? (then, concerned) You didn't invite him to Benihana after the recital, right? That's just us. That's our tradition.
(lying) Soren just had a question about math.
Max notices that X-Ray's eye are welling up.
What happened?
Inez can no drive.
X-Ray, you can't cry in school. It makes us all look weak. Just hold it in.
X-Ray lets out a squeak. He's on the verge.
X-RAY
INT. BATHROOM - MOMENTS LATER
The four boys are huddled in a tight stall. X-Ray is BAWLING.
Is gonna be okay.
Quentin types into his phone.
From here to the Fashion Square Mall is... seventeen minutes.
The door from the hallway opens. They all shush one another. They listen until they hear the sound of urination.
(whispering) Okay, so we'll just miss lunch and be back by fourth period. VOICE (O.S.) Who's crying?
Max peers over the stall to see ROBIN, 12, nosy, peeing.
Should I get a teacher? I'm gonna get a teacher.
No, Robin! This is why people call you "narc."
Why are you going to the mall?
Fabrizio pops up.
To fuck'a your mom!
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
You wish. My mom's in San Diego at a wellness retreat.
Quentin pops up.
Robin, get the fuck out of here!
I'm allowed to be here. It's a free country.
They return to their huddle and continue whispering.
Even if we can get to the mall, how do we get five hundred dollars?
I know how get money. We sell peaches.
Peaches? Are you kidding?
First we get money, then we go to the mall. (to X-Ray) We're not gonna let you get sent to Camden.
Do you pledge it?
I pledge it.
Max extends his hand meaningfully. X-Ray takes it, forming the clasp for the "Boys and Girls Club of America."
Second bell's about to ring.
Quentin pops up, his face red with anger.
Go suck on your mom's fat tits!
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE INT. JOHN ADAMS MIDDLE SCHOOL - DAY
Students roam the halls in between periods. An elderly SECURITY GUARD sits at the entrance, reading an AARP Magazine article about Antonio Banderas. The boys sneak past him.
EXT. JOHN ADAMS MIDDLE SCHOOL - DAY
Quentin, X-Ray and Fabrizio stand on the ROOF, twenty feet up. They look down nervously at Max, who's on the ground.
Come on, it's easy.

Fabrizio grabs onto a PALM FROND and STEPS OFF THE ROOF. His weight LOWERS the frond all the way to the ground -- like a SWISS FAMILY ROBINSON "ELEVATOR." He lets go and the Palm Frond snaps back up to the roof. Quentin follows and lands on the ground. The frond snaps back up to X-Ray. X-RAY
Just wrap your thong around the branch and slide down. (then, to Max and Fabrizio) You hear what I said to him?

X-Ray throws his bag to the ground and grabs the branch. He starts to lower, but then it STOPS, leaving him DANGLING ten feet above the ground. X-Ray's weight is not enough to bring the branch all the way down. X-RAY
You should've kept your backpack on, so you'd be heavier!
I took it off to be more nimble.
X-Ray shakes, but the branch doesn't move. A BEE buzzes by XRay's face. X-RAY (CONT'D)
He frantically tries blowing it away. The bee STINGS him. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Owww!! It stung me! Get my epi-pen! My throat's gonna close!
Fabrizio springs to action and grabs X-Ray's bag, searching for the epi-pen.
Max and Quentin gather underneath X-Ray, arms outstretched. He DROPS and lands between them with a THUD. Owww!!
X-RAY (CONT'D)
Fabrizio pulls the pen out of X-Ray's bag and JABS it into XRay's thigh. Owww!!
X-RAY (CONT'D)
CLOSE ON a UNI-BALL PEN sticking out of his leg. X-RAY (CONT'D)
You say a'pen! A'pen! X-RAY Epi-pen! Epi-pen! Fucking idiot!
Max pulls the real EPIPEN out of the bag.
Max jabs it into X-Ray's other leg.
(weakly) Thank you. (then, to Fabrizio) Sorry I called you an idiot. Is okay.
EXT. WOODS BEHIND SCHOOL - LATER
The school recedes in the background. X-Ray LIMPS behind the others. His pants have puncture wounds and his cheek is hugely swollen from the sting.
... My sister said girls hate the word, "moist." Why?
Quentin shrugs. Max smells his armpit.
I'm moist right now.
Quentin turns back and takes a photo of X-Ray's face. X-RAY What are you doing?
Taking a snap of that baby dick on your cheek.
Max smacks Quentin's hand.
No snaps, no stories. Nothing. We can't be tracked. We have to stay off the grid.
Max's phone buzzes. He checks it. Quentin smacks Max's hand.
What about staying off the grid?
We got a buyer!
The guys CHEER. They step out of the woods and onto -EXT. SUBURBAN STREET - CONTINUOUS Their celebration is short-lived as a POLICE CRUISER, lights flashing, pulls up alongside them.
Lemme do the talking.
The OFFICER sticks his head out.
Hello, Officer. Just want to say "All Lives Matter."
Shouldn't you boys be in school?
A moment of panic as the guys all intuitively turn to Max. He thinks quickly.
It's a Jewish holiday. We're going to temple.
Oh, you're Jews? (then, gives them onceover) Stay on the sidewalks. The Officer drives off.
That was genius!
I liked it!
Quentin's annoyed that someone else is receiving adulation.
I don't think it's "genius" to lie about religion. With what's happening in the world today.
This seems like a deep observation. They contemplate it.
INT. FABRIZIO'S HOUSE - LATER
Quentin and Max play Grand Theft Auto while Fabrizio watches with interest. X-Ray peers out the window, impatiently.
Where the hell is this guy? He was supposed to be here already.
He's coming. Relax.
Max's Avatar lies prone on a rooftop, taking aim at a FEMALE COP, who stands beside a trash can fire. He shoots and
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Why are you shooting that cop? You're wasting bullets.
That's St. Cloud. She's not even a cop. She's bad. She just dresses like one to rob drug dealers.
My dads say that these types of games make you numb to violence.
St. Cloud comes at the Avatar and Max shoots her POINT-BLANK in the face, causing her head to EXPLODE. None of them react.
I wish you could see more brains in her hair.
If you run her over, she'll shit herself.
The doorbell RINGS.
(exasperated) Finally.
He's about to open the door when -QUENTIN
(considers) He can't molest all of us. He could if he drugs us.
If he offers you anything to drink, do not take it.
Maybe we should get some weapons, just to be safe.
(through the door) One minute please! Just need to put something on!
INT. FABRIZIO'S FRONT HALL - MOMENTS LATER
The boys are weaponed up: Max holds a broomstick. Quentin has a tennis racket. X-Ray enters with a PAINTBALL GUN. X-RAY
Switch.
Quentin snatches the paintball gun and hands X-Ray the tennis racket. X-RAY
It's not a toy, okay? Better that I hold it.
Quentin tucks it in his elastic waistband. Fabrizio races down the steps. He's wearing an S&M MASK and holding a set of ANAL BEADS.
Ugh, gross. Those smell like shit!
They all take a strong whiff.
What are those?
I dunno. I find in Bill and Nancy's bedroom. I use to hit.
Fabrizio whips the anal beads over his shoulder like nunchucks and smacks X-Ray in the face.
X-RAY
X-Ray opens the door to REVEAL -- a balding MAN wearing a Vassar College t-shirt. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE He is surprised to be facing four twelve year old boys, one wearing a leather S&M mask.
X-RAY (CONT'D)
Hello... I'm looking for Max? I'm Max.
Max politely extends his hand. Claude shakes it uncertainly.
Are you a pedophile?
(to Quentin) If you were a pedophile, would you admit it? No.
Then why would he?
I'm not a pedophile.
See? We don't know. I'm not!
Do you have the money, Claude? Yeah.
Okay, yes you come now to basement but no shoes.
INT. FABRIZIO'S HOUSE - BASEMENT - DAY
CLOSE UP: A SEX DOLL'S lifeless eyes and open mouth. Claude inspects the doll carefully, gently opens her mouth. 8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
And is this her original mouth and tongue?
I don't know.
Claude notices the kids looking at him strangely.
(covering) Oh, oh. You think? No, no! I want Peaches for the carpool lane... so I can get home to my family faster. Ohhhhh...
We thought you wanted to fuck it.
Ha ha terrific! I think you mean,
"Fuck her." Claude hands Fabrizio a wad of cash.
Here you go. Four hundred.
No, it's five-fifty. That's what we said in the ad.
Yeah, but now that I'm here and looking at it and it's out of the box -- I feel like it's only worth four.
Quentin holds up his hand.
Claude, you have to see it from our side: we're running a business here. If you don't like the price, no hard feelings. Have a great day.
The boys look at Quentin like he's crazy. Quentin turns to Max.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
Max, give that married couple a call and tell them they can pick up the doll.
Claude considers this.
Well, I don't want to lose her.
He pulls out some more bills, hands Fabrizio all the cash. He pulls out a sundress from his satchel.
Can you help me dress her?
Of course, Claude.
The Boys dutifully lift up the doll's arms as Claude pulls a sundress from his bag and slides it over her arms.
EXT. FABRIZIO'S HOUSE - DAY
The Boys struggle to carry Peaches to Claude's Maxima.
You can just toss her in the trunk.
He opens the trunk and motions for them to place her inside.
Didn't you need her up front for the carpool lane? ... Right.
CLAUDE
He opens the passenger door and the guys put her in. Quentin extends his hand.
Best of luck with everything.
... Thank you.
Claude gets in the car and drives off. They wave goodbye.
I liked Claude. He was relatable.
8FLiX.com SCREENPLAY DATABASE
(realizing) Dammit! We should've asked him for a ride to the mall.
OVER DEMI LOVATO'S "CONFIDENT":
EXT. FABRIZIO'S HOUSE - LATER

The garage OPENS and the boys step out, rolling out a woman's bike and a seven year old girl's bike. -- The boys apply liberal amounts of sunblock to any exposed skin. They help each other apply lotion to their necks. -- Velcro straps are fastened around ELBOW PADS. -- HELMET straps are tightened. -- Water bottles are inserted into water bottle slots in a backpack. -- X-Ray clips on a REFLECTOR VEST. CHYRON: TWENTY MINUTES LATER They're about to set off.
(checks watch) Come on, come on! We're behind schedule.
Max runs back into the garage and comes out with the PAINTBALL GUN.
Why are you bringing that?
